documentation.description: Demonstrate uint64 factories and arithmetic, returning the round-tripped value.
documentation.returns: the sum after a uint64 → bytes → uint64 round trip

documentation.description: Demonstrate biguint factories, conversion from uint64, and op.bsqrt.
documentation.returns: the integer square root of value²

documentation.description: Demonstrate Bytes() factory, Bytes.fromHex(), op.sha256, and bytes-to-biguint conversion.
documentation.returns: SHA-256 hash of the concatenated input

documentation.description: Demonstrate op.addw (128-bit addition) and op.itob / op.btoi conversions.
documentation.returns: the low 64 bits of the 128-bit sum
